source_metadata.title: 2025/12/03 - MA (Part 3)
source_metadata.description:
Wednesday 3 December 2025 | Māori Affairs Committee

2024/25 Annual review of Te Reo Whakapuaki Irirangi (Māori Broadcasting Funding Agency)

Hearing of evidence
Submitters list:

Te Māngai Pāho (Māori Broadcasting Authority)

Reikura Kahi, Te Māngai Pāho Board Chair
Kingi Kiriona, Te Māngai Pāho Board Deputy Chair
Tamalene Painting, Te Māngai Pāho Board member
Larry Parr, Chief Executive
Wi-Tako Love, Manager of Finance (2IC)
Jessica Tawhiri, Manager of Communications
Materia Hutana, Executive Assistant to the CE


2024/25 Annual review of Te Aratuku Whakaata Irirangi Māori (Māori Television Service)

Hearing of evidence
Submitters list:

Te Aratuku Whakaata Irirangi Māori (Māori Television Service)

Jamie Tuuta, Toihau | Chair
Shane Taurima, Kaihautū | Chief Executive
Andrew McNaughton, Kaiurungi Whakahaere Hangarau | Director Technology, Operations & Strategy
Maria Barlow, Kaiurungi Pāpāho | Director Content & Audience Engament
Ngarimu Parata, Kaiurungi Toi Tangata | Director People, Language & Culture
